title: libartifact: introduce handling of artifact store events

comments.body: i realize this is not break changes but id like to see if we can get this in ... @nimdrak lets remove the additional events for now. I'm more concerned about you getting in the event handling, etc.

> i realize this is not break changes but id like to see if we can get this in ... @nimdrak lets remove the additional events for now. I'm more concerned about you getting in the event handling, etc.

I have 0 capacity to review this or other larger non 6 work right now so I rather not see this blocking 6 here...

> i realize this is not break changes but id like to see if we can get this in ... @nimdrak lets remove the additional events for now. I'm more concerned about you getting in the event handling, etc.

@baude, @Luap99 Got it. I will remove them and update the PR ASAP.
LGTM, a little more explanation in the commit message would be appreciated but not required.  thanks!

> LGTM, a little more explanation in the commit message would be appreciated but not required. thanks!

Thanks for the review! I'll make sure to provide more detailed commit messages in future PRs. I appreciate the feedback!
Given the request from @Luap99 that we do some refactoring in 6.1, I think what we have here is fine. Gets things working, which is more important than getting them perfect.
